lines.speaker: General Vir
lines.text: Yes. Is there something important you need? We're currently quite occupied.

lines.speaker: General Vir
lines.text: Yes... We're currently attacking the Lizardmen, are you blind?!

lines.speaker: General Vir
lines.text: A chat? Who let you into this camp? GET OUT!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No need to shout. I guess I'm not wanted here.

lines.speaker: General Vir
lines.text: You are correct! Unless you plan to help with the war effort, you should leave. Now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmph, you need to work on your people skills.
